hero.philosophical1: That sense of dissonance is not a mistake.
hero.philosophical2: The void is not emptiness. It is space for becoming.
hero.philosophical3: You never belonged to the ordinary — not from the beginning.
hero.cta: This will become part of you.
hero.emotion1: For a long time, you have carried something words could not hold. This work gives place to what cannot be said.
hero.emotion2: Between silence and noise, there exists a frequency only you can hear. This is its form.
hero.emotion3: The world demanded you conform. This exists for the moment you chose to dissolve.
hero.identity1: For those who find no place in this world.
hero.identity2: For those who exist between words.
hero.identity3: For those who refuse comfort and choose truth.
hero.philosophyBlock: Not a sale — a decision. Each piece is numbered and will not be reproduced. TCDA exists at the intersection of wearable objects and the record of emotion.

product.details: Each piece is assigned an individual serial number. This artwork will not be restocked. What you wear becomes part of the archive.
product.notesItem1: Colors may vary slightly from the original depending on your monitor settings and lighting conditions.
product.notesItem2: As this item is produced overseas, minor scuffs or dents on the packaging may occasionally occur.

size.guideNote: Measurements in cm. If you are between sizes, we recommend sizing up.
size.label: Size

checkout.shippingReturnsText: Orders are fulfilled within 2–5 business days via Printful. Delivery typically takes 5–10 business days depending on your region. For damaged, misprinted, or incorrectly shipped items, please contact us at info@tcdashop.com within 7 days of receipt. We will arrange a replacement or refund after verification.

order.confirmedMessage: A confirmation has been sent to your email. This piece is now part of the archive.

faq.a1: Orders are dispatched within 2–5 business days and typically arrive within 5–10 business days.
faq.q2: Do you accept returns or exchanges?
faq.a2: Returns are accepted within 14 days for defective items. One size exchange per order is available.
faq.a3: For a relaxed fit, we recommend sizing up. Our model is 180 cm tall and wears a size M.

sizeHelp.q: Not sure which size to pick?
sizeHelp.a: Check the Size Guide for garment measurements. When between sizes, we recommend sizing up.

oversized.q: How do I get an oversized fit?
oversized.a: Choose one size up from your usual size. Silhouettes vary by product — check the fit info on each product page.

modelSize.q: What size does the model wear?
modelSize.a: Height and size worn are listed on each product page. Note: AI-generated model imagery is used.

deliveryTime.a: Orders are fulfilled within 2–5 business days, then typically arrive within 5–10 business days after dispatch. A tracking number is sent after shipment.

internationalShipping.a: Items are dispatched from an overseas production partner. Delivery can be tracked using the provided tracking number.

returns.a: We accept returns for damaged, misprinted, or incorrectly shipped items only. Returns due to size or personal preference are not accepted.

colorDifference.q: Will the color match what I see on screen?
colorDifference.a: Colors may vary slightly depending on your monitor settings and lighting conditions.

washing.a: Machine wash is available. For longevity, we recommend washing inside out.

paymentMethods.a: We accept credit cards only (Visa, Mastercard, JCB, American Express, Diners Club).

orderChange.q: Can I change or cancel my order after placing it?
orderChange.a: Orders cannot be modified or cancelled once confirmed. Please review carefully before purchasing.

restock.a: Restocking dates are not confirmed. Updates will be shared via our official social channels when available.

defect.q: What if my item has a defect?
defect.a: Please contact us at info@tcdashop.com within 7 days of receiving your order. We will arrange a replacement or refund after verification.

sizeGuide.title: Size Guide
sizeGuide.pageIntro: All measurements in cm (toggle available). Find your fit using the guide below.
sizeGuide.measureChest: Measure around the fullest part of your chest, keeping the tape horizontal.
sizeGuide.measureLength: Measure from the highest point of the shoulder down to the hem.
sizeGuide.measureShoulder: Measure from shoulder seam to shoulder seam across the back.
sizeGuide.measureSleeve: Measure from the shoulder seam down to the cuff.
sizeGuide.faq1q: How do I find my size?
sizeGuide.faq1a: Compare your body measurements to our size chart. If between sizes, size up for a relaxed fit or size down for a fitted look.
sizeGuide.faq2q: What is the difference between body measurements and garment measurements?
sizeGuide.faq2a: Body measurements are yours. Garment measurements are the actual dimensions of the piece. The difference is the ease.
sizeGuide.faq3q: I'm between sizes. What should I do?
sizeGuide.faq3a: For oversized or relaxed fits, size down. For slim fits, size up. When in doubt, refer to the model info on the product page.
sizeGuide.faq4q: Do the sizes run large or small?
sizeGuide.faq4a: Sizing varies by product type. Check the fit label on each product page for guidance.
sizeGuide.faq5a: One size exchange per order is available. Contact us within 14 days of receipt.
sizeGuide.faq6a: Measurements are taken flat and may vary ±1–2 cm due to production tolerances.
sizeGuide.faq7a: A slim fit follows the body closely. We recommend sizing up if you prefer more ease.
sizeGuide.faq8a: Oversized pieces are intentionally large. The silhouette is designed to fall away from the body.
sizeGuide.faq9q: Do you offer sizing guidance for unisex pieces?
sizeGuide.faq9a: Unisex pieces are sized to fit all bodies. Check the model info on the product page for reference.
sizeGuide.faq10q: Are measurements in cm or inches?
sizeGuide.faq10a: Both are available. Use the toggle on the size guide to switch between cm and inches.
sizeGuide.faq11q: What if the size guide is not yet available for a product?
sizeGuide.faq11a: We are adding size guides for all products. Check back soon, or contact us for guidance.
sizeGuide.faq12q: How should I care for my piece?
sizeGuide.faq12a: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Do not tumble dry. Iron inside out on low heat.
sizeGuide.measurementVariationNote: Slight variation (±1–2 cm) may occur due to production tolerances.

measurementHelp.width: flat across the chest at underarm
measurementHelp.length: from shoulder top down to hem
measurementHelp.shoulder: across the back, seam to seam

fit.slimNote: Sits close to the body. Size up if you prefer room to move.
fit.regularNote: True to size. Relaxed through the chest and body.
fit.relaxedNote: Loose silhouette. Falls away from the body. Size down if you prefer a fitted look.
fit.oversizedNote: Intentionally oversized. Designed to drape. Size down for a regular silhouette.

trust.supported: Defect or shipping error? Contact us within 7 days of receipt

shippingReturns.title: Shipping & Returns
shippingReturns.pageIntro: Everything you need to know about shipping and our returns policy. Questions? Email info@tcdashop.com.
shippingReturns.shippingBody: Orders are fulfilled within 2–5 business days via Printful. A tracking number will be sent once dispatched.
shippingReturns.deliveryBody: After dispatch, delivery typically takes 5–10 business days. Times may vary by region.
shippingReturns.returnsCondition: Eligible cases: damaged, misprinted, or incorrectly shipped items only
shippingReturns.returnsPeriod: Timeframe: contact us within 7 days of receiving your order
shippingReturns.returnsMethod: Resolution: replacement or refund after verification
shippingReturns.returnsNote: Returns due to size preference or change of mind are not accepted.
shippingReturns.contactBody: For any other questions, please reach out at the address below.

contact.title: Contact
contact.pageIntro: Questions about your order, shipping, or a product issue?
contact.intro: For order inquiries, shipping, or product issues — reach us here. We typically reply within 2–3 business days.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Message received. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at info@tcdashop.com.
contact.errorBody: Please try again, or reach us directly at the address below.
contact.replyNote: We typically reply within 2–3 business days.

dataCollection.title: 1. Information We Collect
dataCollection.body: We collect your name, address, email address, phone number, and payment information for order processing. Payment information is securely handled by Stripe, Inc. and is not retained by us.

dataUsage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.body: Collected information is used for order processing, shipping, customer support, and service improvement. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.

thirdParty.title: 3. Third-Party Sharing
thirdParty.body: To fulfill your order, we share necessary shipping information with Printful (our manufacturing and fulfillment partner). No other third-party sharing occurs except as required by law.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.body: This site uses cookies for analytics via Google Analytics (GA4). You may disable cookies without affecting your ability to use the site.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.body: Personal information is managed with appropriate security measures to prevent unauthorized access, leaks, or tampering.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.body: For inquiries regarding your personal information, please contact us at info@tcdashop.com.

address.label: Address
address.value: Taishido 5-17-1 Maison de Miroir 103, Setagaya-ku, Tokyo, Japan

price.label: Price
price.value: As listed on each product page (tax included)

payment.label: Payment Methods
payment.value: Credit card (Visa / Mastercard / JCB / American Express / Diners Club)

delivery.label: Delivery
delivery.value: Typically ships within 5–10 business days after order confirmation

returns.label: Returns & Exchanges
returns.value: Due to the nature of our products, cancellations, returns, and exchanges are generally not accepted after order confirmation. Exceptions apply for damaged items, printing defects, or misdelivery — contact info@tcdashop.com within 7 days of receipt. A replacement or refund will be arranged.

cookie.message: We use cookies via Google Analytics (GA4) to understand how visitors use our site. Please choose your preference below.

about.storyTitle: Turning digital art into wearable culture.
about.storyBody: TCDA is a brand that brings art born in the digital world into reality as wearable garments. Visuals that once existed only on screens — now something you can actually wear. That is why TCDA exists.
about.value1Body: Art before product. Every design originates from artistic intent, not market demand.
about.value2Body: Wear your individuality. Show your individuality. What you put on is your declaration.
about.value3Body: Art without borders. A visual language that transcends geography, culture, and language.
